reader_mode: canonical substrate landing with left-arrow toy route and right-arrow rendered and aliased visual families

landing_screen.right_arrow_view: implemented render-family sequence beginning at V001_first_radius_sweep
landing_screen.implementation: index.html loads browser-native HTML pages in a full-window iframe for Tier 0 and toy routes, and uses the render stage for implemented and aliased visual families
landing_screen.persistent_navigation: bottom back/forward controls cycle through toy, Tier 0, and implemented/aliased render-family screens

renderer_strategy.visual_style: mute substrate geometry with station labels only; no internal explanatory prose

renderer_family_completed_or_exposed: pair and relation family foundation V010-V015 plus pair continuations
renderer_expansion_policy: renderer families over canonical substrate, not bespoke scene files
